description: HSL (Helsinki Region Transport) publishes public transport data and offers APIs related to ticketing and commuter-benefit integrations. Its services cover journey and realtime transit data, Bluetooth beacon data, and sales interfaces for HSL tickets and benefits.
summary: hsl.fi exposes four developer-facing HTTP surfaces on its own domains: public Beacon and GTFS-RT feeds, plus authenticated OpenMaaS and Partner ticketing APIs; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found on hsl.fi subdomains.
